ERP IQAC ALUMNI CAREER QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 ELECTRICAL & ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING 0 LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 0 + RECRUITERS 0 + PUBLICATIONS 0 + PATENTS 24LPA HIGHEST SALARY PACKAGE 100+ RECRUITERS 70+ PUBLICATIONS 10+ PATENTS PROGRAM SCOPE In today’s context, human life without electricity and electronic appliances is simply unimaginable

. Human civilization has seen a great development with the invention of electricity. As we develop more and more gadgets to automate our activities, the field of electrical and electronics engineering becomes more and more exciting. With the faster depletion of fossil fuels and with the advent of electric vehicles and solar powered systems and the extensive industrial automation that takes place, the study of electrical & electronics engineering is gaining substantial significance with larger number of students choosing to study

. LEARNING SCOPE At Sri Eshwar, in the program of EEE, we strive to develop world class electrical and electronics engineers, by teaching them Internet of Things (IOT), Electronic Design and Automation, Robotics, Industrial Automation, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Image Processing, Wireless Technologies, E-Vehicles, Design and Manufacture of Special Purpose Machines and the need of the hour Renewable Energy Solutions and tools like ECAD,MATLAB etc., In addition to the above the students are also provided exposure to software courses like Database Management System, OOPs Concepts, Java Technologies

. CAREER PROGRESSION With many countries rapidly shifting to electric vehicles and increase in demands in the energy sector, Electrical and Electronics engineering students have abundant opportunities with high demand in power generation, transportation, medical electronics, communication, aerospace, automation and process industries. Electrical and Electronics graduates can also serve in government organizations, public sector companies and private industries. For this field of engineering, sky is the limit

. For this field of engineering, sky is the limit. VISION To become a centre of excellence that focusses on Embedded Systems, Industrial Automation, Electronic Design and Automation domains and evolve as an integrated facility provider for academic services that includes research and innovation that are practically useful to the society. MISSION Evolve curriculum and delivery approaches to provide broad and wide exposure to gain knowledge in their field of study. Provide opportunities to enhance domain knowledge and skills required for the programs offered. Establish connections with local, national and global experts to share, utilize and exchange domain expertise

. Establish connections with local, national and global experts to share, utilize and exchange domain expertise. Conduct Outreach activities for the society that involve the use of electrical engineering solutions to address societal challenges. Create and provide conducive eco system and facilities for offering education related to electrical and electronics engineering. PROGRAM DETAILS Program Educational Objectives PEO1: Graduates will take up careers in Electrical and Electronics Engineering like design and manufacture of Electrical and Electronic and its related systems and involve in carrying out engineering projects related to societal issues

. PEO2: Graduates will engage in a post graduate program in the field of Electrical and Electronics Engineering Sciences and Management Sciences leading to academic and research careers. PEO3: Graduates will take up entrepreneurship as a career. Program Outcomes PO1: Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2: Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development

. PO3: Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required. PO4: Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. PO5: Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems

. PO6: The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. PO7: Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams

. PO8: Individual and Collaborative Teamwork: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9: Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences. PO10: Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments

. PO11: Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. Program Specific Outcomes PSO1: Design, analyse and control the energy conversion systems and power systems integrated with renewable energy ensuring sustainable and ethical engineering solutions. PSO2: Design, implement and optimize embedded systems and industrial automations ensuring the development of efficient, reliable and advanced automation solutions

. Gunapriya M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 15.06.2022 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, Electric Vehicles and Intelligent Control Dr.D.Gunapriya ,is an Associate Professor in the department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering with over 18 years of experience. She has an extensive publication record , including 32 technical articles , 6 patents and 3 book chapters. Her research interests encompass Power Electronics and Drives , Electric Vehicles and Intelligent Control. She actively serves as reviewer for reputed Journals and holds lifetime memberships with ISTE and IETE.Her commitment to academic excellence and leadership in various accreditation and quality assurance processes have significantly contributed to the advancement of the department

. Dr.M.Geetha M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 19.07.2023 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, Analog Electronics, Microprocessor and Microcontroller Dr. M. Geetha is an Assistant Professor (Selection Grade) in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering with 16 years of extensive teaching experience. Obtained UG Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics & Drives. Awarded with Doctorate in the year 2023 from Anna University, Chennai. Her research area includes Power Electronics and Drives, Renewable energy and embedded systems. She has published more than 20 research articles in various journals, authored 2 Books in the field of Renewable Energy, published 5 patents including 1 patent grant in design

. She is an active life time member in ISTE, IETE and IGEN. Dr.P.Anbarasu M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 19.06.2013 Areas of Specialization Control Engineering, Autonomous Vehicle, Nature Inspired Algorithms, Machine Learning, Integration of Renewable Energy Dr.P. Anbarasu completed his Doctor of Philosophy from Anna University, Chennai, India; PG Degree in Power Electronics and Drives and UG in Electrical and Electronics Engineering. His current research focuses on Integration of Renewable Energy Systems in the Smart Grid and Autonomous Vehicle. He has 2 years of industrial experience and 13 years of academic and research experiences

. He has 2 years of industrial experience and 13 years of academic and research experiences. He has published 32 research articles in various journals He has completed 4 Government of India funded research projects, 2 Government of Tamil Nadu funded projects and 1 Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) project. He has 1 patent to his credit. He is a Member of ISTE, SSI and IAENG . Also he has organized various FDPs, Conferences, Workshops and Seminars. He has completed 6 NPTEL courses successfully and received NPTEL Top performing mentor recognition from IIT Madras

. He has completed 6 NPTEL courses successfully and received NPTEL Top performing mentor recognition from IIT Madras. Dr.N.Pushpalatha M.E, Ph.D D.O.J : 06.01.2010 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, Power quality, Renewable Energy system, Artificial Intelligence in Electrical Engineering, Internet of Things Dr.N.Pushpalatha is an Assistant Professor (Selection Grade) in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, obtained her UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering in 2009 and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives in the year 2013. Awarded with Doctoral Degree in Electrical Engineering from Anna University Chennai in 2024. She is an active life time member in ISTE , IETE and Graduate Member in IEEE

. She is an active life time member in ISTE , IETE and Graduate Member in IEEE. She has acted as Technical Program Committee member, session chair and reviewer for various international and national conferences in India and Abroad. Authored and published more than 40 research articles in various journals, published 14 patents including 1 Design patent grant. She has also acted as resource person in “NSTEDB DST Government of India EDII, Ahmedabad Funded Women Entrepreneurship Development Program” consecutively for four years. Acted as Project Evaluator for “Toycathon 2021” organized by the Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education, New Delhi

. Acted as Project Evaluator for “Toycathon 2021” organized by the Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education, New Delhi. Dr.S.Sheikameer Batcha ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.11.2011 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics , Embedded System , Internet of Things , Solar PV systems Dr. Sheikameer Batcha completed his UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree in with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives and received his PhD at Anna University, Chennai. He has been honored as an Innovation Ambassador by the Ministry of Education through the Institution Innovation Council (IIC)

. He has been honored as an Innovation Ambassador by the Ministry of Education through the Institution Innovation Council (IIC). He is a certified trainer for Solar PV Installation, accredited by the Skill Council for Green Jobs, and a Master Trainer in “Foundation Skills in Integrated Product Development,” certified by Anna University and NASSCOM. He is also a trainer in “Design Thinking” certified by the School of Design. He has published 14 research articles in various journals. He is a life member in ISTE and IGEN. He has contributed in establishing a Centre of Excellence in Embedded System and Automation. . He has published 4 research articles in various journals.He has contributed in establishing a Centre of Excellence in Embedded System and Automation. Mr.K.Raj Thilak ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 19.06.2013 Areas of Specialization Renewable Energy, Electric Vehicles, Energy Auditing and Management, Fuel Conversion Systems Mr.K.Raj Thilak obtained his UG Degree in Electrical & Electronics Engineering in the year 2011 and PG Degree with specialization in Energy Engineering in 2013. Currently pursuing his Doctoral program in Vel Tech Rangarajan Dr.Sagunthala R&D Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai. His research area includes Renewable Energy, Alternative Fuels, Electric Vehicle and Energy Management

. His research area includes Renewable Energy, Alternative Fuels, Electric Vehicle and Energy Management. He has published 15 research articles in various journals. He is a Life time member in ISTE and IGEN. He has also assisted in carrying out consultancy activities in Energy Auditing for various industries & institutions and completed over 30 consultancy activities so far. Mr.C.Mohan Raj ME., (Ph.D) D.O.J : 23.12.2013 Areas of Specialization Power Electronics and Drives, PLC and Industrial Automation, Power Quality Mr.C.Mohan Raj obtained his UG degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree with specialization in Power Electronics and Drives.He is currently pursuing his PhD in Faculty of Electrical Engineering from PSG College of Technology, Anna University

. He has completed 5 certified courses in Embedded Systems and Industrial Automation. He is the authorized trainer for the Mitsubishi ATC for PLC and Industrial Automation. He has successfully completed 3 IEDC funded projects and organized ATAL FDP on Topic “ Robotics – The Machine Power for Industrial Automation”. He has acted as resource person for various programs related to Industrial Automation for academic and industrial persons. He has published 10 research articles in various journals and 6 patents and authored 3 books. He is a life member in ISTE, IAENG and IGEN. He has created and uploaded more than 100 Educational Videos in Youtube channel “Learn Electrical Concepts and Mathematics” and received more than 2.3 K Subscribers so far

. Mr.R.Sasikumar M.E., MISTE., MIAENG D.O.J : 01.08.2025 Areas of Specialization Industrial Automation, PLC, HMI, VFD & SCADA , Electrical Drives, System Integration Sasikumar completed his UG Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and PG Degree in Electrical Drives and Embedded Controls. He brings over 10+ years of industry experience along with 6 years of teaching experience, creating a strong balance between practical industrial exposure and academic expertise. He has worked at various professional levels including Application Engineer, Automation Engineer, Project Coordinator, and Assistant Manager, contributing to the design, execution, and management of complex automation projects

. His experience spans multiple industrial domains such as Automotive, Food Processing, Special Purpose Machines (SPM), Mining, and Defence, where he has successfully delivered reliable and scalable automation solutions. He has hands-on expertise with global automation platforms from leading brands such as Siemens, Rockwell, ABB, Delta, Mitsubishi, Omron, and Autonics, with strong skills in PLC programming, HMI & SCADA development, control panel design, and complete system integration. With a passion for both industry and teaching, he continues to mentor students and professionals while delivering industry-oriented automation solutions aligned with modern engineering standards.
